mapper.sql: id, process_name AS processName, is_del AS isDel, create_time AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT process_name as processName, process_key as processKey FROM bpm_process_name WHERE is_del = 0
SELECT process_name as processName, process_key as processKey FROM bpm_process_name WHERE process_key = #{processKey} AND is_del = 0
SELECT process_key FROM bpm_process_name WHERE process_name = #{processName} AND is_del = 0
